variant: TR-35, TR-50, TR-75 (sample specs shown for TR-50 with 25-foot runways)

installation_requirements.concrete_requirements: 4000 PSI concrete 6 inches thick floor or (4) 6 ft x 6 ft footings 12 inches deep
installation_requirements.work_area: Clear and unobstructed with no side obstructions

specifications.lifting_mechanism: (4) Direct drive cylinders using no cables, chains or mechanical lifting screws
specifications.track_length_note: Longer on request; 25 ft standard for TR-35 and TR-50; 30 ft standard for TR-75
specifications.synchronization_side_to_side: Hydraulic fluid displacement backed by twin opposing leaf chains
specifications.synchronization_fore_and_aft: Manual or automatic controls gear type flow dividers, integral differential relief valving, with an automatic fluid track leveling system
specifications.mechanical_safety_systems: Multi-position locks in each post starting at 10 inches
specifications.hydraulic_safety_systems: Integral hydrostatic line blow off flow control devices and velocity fuses

features: 35,000, 50,000, or 75,000 lb capacity four-post track lifts
(4) Direct drive cylinders - no cables, chains, or mechanical lifting screws
5-foot lifting stroke with 6 ft 2.5 in runway height at full stroke
Track lengths: 20, 25, 30, 35 ft or longer on request
Hydraulic fluid displacement synchronization (side to side) with twin opposing leaf chains
Gear type flow dividers with automatic fluid track leveling (fore and aft)
Multi-position safety locks in each post starting at 10 inches
Integral hydrostatic line blow off flow control devices and velocity fuses
NEMA Type 4 Waterproof push button electronic console
Automatic wheel chocks standard (front and rear)
Adjustable width between posts and overall width
Red lines on drawing indicate 32-inch track width model

optional_equipment.note: Air/hydraulic; rolls full length of runway; ALI certified
Available for models TR-35 through TR-75
Rolling jack swing arm/slider extender for vehicles with independent front suspension
Air/hydraulic for rear ends, differentials, heavy transmissions

Accessory for TR-75 (shown with jacking beam)

certifications: Available under discounted government contract in all 50 states
safety_features: Multi-position locks in each post starting at 10 inches
Integral hydrostatic line blow off flow control devices
Automatic wheel chocks standard (front and rear)
